packageRules.description: Auto-merge safe non-major updates once required status checks pass. platformAutomerge defers the actual merge to GitHub's native auto-merge, which respects branch protection (see NOTE at bottom of this file for the branch protection settings this relies on).
Never auto-merge major updates; always require manual review
Important frameworks/toolchain deps require manual review even for minor updates
Group all Radix UI primitive updates together
Group all TypeScript ESLint tooling updates together
Group all Storybook ecosystem updates together
Group ESLint core + plugins together (excluding @typescript-eslint, grouped separately above)
Group all internal workspace package updates (apps/packages cross-references)
Group all @types/* type-definition-only updates (low risk, safe to batch)

prBodyNotes: This PR was created automatically by Renovate.

NOTE: Auto-merge for non-major updates relies on `platformAutomerge` deferring to GitHub's native auto-merge feature, which only merges once all *required* status checks pass. For this to be effective, configure GitHub branch protection on `main` with:
- "Require status checks to pass before merging" enabled
- The `Unit Tests` and `Storybook Tests (UI/A11y)` jobs from `.github/workflows/test.yml` (and any other required CI jobs) added as required checks
- "Require branches to be up to date before merging" (optional, but recommended since `rebaseWhen: behind-base-branch` is set above)
These settings must be configured in the GitHub repository UI/API (Settings > Branches) and cannot be set from this file.
